name: crunch
title: crunch
description:
tool for creating wordlist
Crunch is a wordlist generator where you can specify a standard
character set or any set of characters to be used in generating
the wordlists. The wordlists are created through combination and
permutation of a set of characters. You can determine the amount
of characters and list size.
.
This program supports numbers and symbols, upper and lower case
characters separately and Unicode.

commands.description: generate wordlists from a character set

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use crunch because tool for creating wordlist.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use crunch as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `crunch <min-len> <max-len> [<charset string>] [options]` as documented upstream for crunch.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `crunch 1 8` as documented upstream for crunch.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `crunch will display a wordlist that starts at a and ends at zzzzzzzz` as documented upstream for crunch.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `crunch 1 6 abcdefg` as documented upstream for crunch.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair crunch with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `crunch --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: crunch - generate wordlists from a character set
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install crunch. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `crunch <min-len> <max-len> [<charset string>] [options]`. Further invocations from upstream: `crunch 1 8 -f charset.lst mixalpha-numeric-all-space -o wordlist.txt`; `crunch  will  use the mixalpha-numeric-all-space character set from charset.lst and will write`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: tool for creating wordlist.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: crunch - generate wordlists from a character set.
